'''jangoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrarchy|iatrarchy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrarchy|iatrarchy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jangoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jængeketh|jængeketh]] || [[word:jængekej|jængekej]] || [[word:jængekesh|jængekesh]] || [[word:jængeke|jængeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangongokoth|jangongokoth]] || [[word:jangongokoj|jangongokoj]] || [[word:jangongokosh|jangongokosh]] || [[word:jangongoko|jangongoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangokoth|jangokoth]] || [[word:jangokoj|jangokoj]] || [[word:jangokosh|jangokosh]] || [[word:jangoko|jangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangofkoth|jangofkoth]] || [[word:jangofkoj|jangofkoj]] || [[word:jangofkosh|jangofkosh]] || [[word:jangofkof|jangofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jangokotho|jangokotho]] || [[word:jangokojo|jangokojo]] || [[word:jangokosho|jangokosho]] || [[word:jangokoko|jangokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jangokoth|jangokoth]] || [[word:jangokoj|jangokoj]] || [[word:jangokosh|jangokosh]] || [[word:jangoko|jangoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jangokothol|jangokothol]] || [[word:jangokojol|jangokojol]] || [[word:jangokoshol|jangokoshol]] || [[word:jangokokol|jangokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jangokothotho|jangokothotho]] || [[word:jangokojojo|jangokojojo]] || [[word:jangokoshosho|jangokoshosho]] || [[word:jangokoko|jangokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jangokothon|jangokothon]] || [[word:jangokojon|jangokojon]] || [[word:jangokoshon|jangokoshon]] || [[word:jangokokon|jangokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jangokothoro|jangokothoro]] || [[word:jangokojoro|jangokojoro]] || [[word:jangokoshoro|jangokoshoro]] || [[word:jangokokoro|jangokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
